sections_cited: section 37 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5949 of 2025 [Shahrukh Ali v. Naimatullah Bhutto & another] Petitioner: Shahrukh Ali son of Sarfaraz Ali through Mr. Zain ul Abideen Rajpoort, Advocate. Date of hearing: 12-12-2025 Date of decision: 12-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner apprehends arrest pursuant to summons issued under section 37 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Such apprehension is misplaced as the summons is with regards to departmental proceedings and not criminal proceedings. With that observation, petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
